meta.description: Automated evaluate→fix loop protocol. Agents run validation checks, automatically fix violations, and re-validate until all checks pass or max iterations reached.

stop_conditions: No fixable violations found (manual review needed)
loop_config.escalation: If loop exhausts max_iterations with remaining failures, report to user with specific unfixed violations and why auto-fix couldn't resolve them

step_1_validate.description: Run all checks from validation-runner.json against the generated code
step_1_validate.input: File paths of generated code (Page, Container, Component, styled, types, i18n)
step_1_validate.output: List of violations with check_id, severity, file, line, evidence

step_2_classify.description: Classify each violation by fix strategy

auto_fixable.description: Agent can fix without user input
examples: Hardcoded hex color → replace with theme token
Hardcoded px spacing → replace with theme.mcui.spacing(n)
Hardcoded font size → replace with theme.mcui.typography.* token
Inline style → extract to styled-component
Missing i18n → wrap with t() and create key
Missing loading state → add isFetching check with MCCircularLoader
Missing error handling → add useEffect with fireCollapsibleError
Wrong import path → fix to correct path from components.json
Missing required prop → add with default value
SC prefix missing → rename styled component
Transient prop missing $ prefix → add $ prefix
MCSingleTextInput in form → replace with MCFormTextInput
Import order wrong → reorder imports per conventions.json

semi_auto.description: Agent can fix but should confirm with user
examples: Component used outside required parent (Formik) → restructure may affect logic
Data fetching in Component layer → move to Container requires refactoring
Missing form validation schema → needs business rules from user
Missing success feedback → needs correct navigation target
Architecture layer violation in complex multi-panel forms (pragmatic trade-off)
Missing empty state message (needs UX decision on what to show)
Accessibility: custom component keyboard navigation (needs interaction design)
Missing route registration (needs route path and allowedRoles decision)

no-hardcoded-colors.fix: Look up the hex value in tokens.json color sections. Find the matching semantic token. Replace with theme.mcui.palette.{path}. If no exact match, use the closest semantic token.

no-hardcoded-spacing.fix: Convert px value to spacing multiplier (px / 8). Replace with theme.mcui.spacing(n). For non-multiples-of-8, use nearest value.

no-hardcoded-fonts.fix: Match px value to typography token in tokens.json. Replace with theme.mcui.typography.{TOKEN}.size.

no-inline-styles.fix: Extract inline styles to a new SC* styled-component. Place in styledComponents.tsx if file exists, or create one. Convert any hardcoded values to theme tokens during extraction.

i18n-required.fix: 1. Add useTranslation hook if not present (Container layer only per architecture rules). 2. Replace string with t('key.path'). 3. Add key to i18n JSON file. 4. Follow namespace convention: 'container.{entity}.{action}' for containers, 'form.{entity}' for forms.

missing-loading-state.detection: Container has useQuery/tRPC call but no isLoading/isFetching check
missing-loading-state.fix: Add loading check before render. Use MCCircularLoader with fillParent for full-page loading, MCLoader for inline loading.

missing-error-handling.detection: Container has useQuery/tRPC call but no error handling with fireCollapsibleError
missing-error-handling.fix: Add useEffect with error check and fireCollapsibleError from useInAppAlert. For query errors: navigate away. For mutation errors: stay on page.

sc-prefix-missing.fix: Rename the styled component to have SC prefix. Update all references in the same file.

wrong-import-path.detection: Import path doesn't match components.json importStatement
wrong-import-path.fix: Replace with the exact importStatement from components.json. Check components.json → component.importStatement for the canonical path.

transient-props.detection: Non-HTML props on styled-components without $ prefix
transient-props.fix: Add $ prefix to the prop name in both the type definition and all usage sites within the file.

no-direct-mcsingleinput.detection: regex: MCSingleTextInput in form component files
no-direct-mcsingleinput.fix: Replace MCSingleTextInput with MCFormTextInput. Add name prop for Formik integration. Update import path to @msm-portal/common/component/form/v1/input/MCFormTextInput.

import-order.detection: Imports not following prescribed order from conventions.json
import-order.fix: Reorder imports: (1) React and react-related, (2) third-party libraries (styled-components, formik, yup), (3) @moloco/moloco-cloud-react-ui, (4) @msm-portal/* internal imports, (5) relative imports (./, ../).

missing-submit-disabled.fix: Add disabled={isSubmitting} to the submit button to prevent double submission.

missing-success-feedback.detection: Mutation onSuccess handler without fireSuccess call
missing-success-feedback.fix: Add fireSuccess toast and navigation after successful mutation. Create → navigate to list. Edit → navigate to detail.

step_4_revalidate.description: Re-run validation checks on the fixed code
step_4_revalidate.output: Updated violation list. If all error-severity checks pass → EXIT LOOP. Otherwise → back to step_2.
step_4_revalidate.early_exit: If no violations were fixed in this iteration (all remaining are semi_auto or manual_only), exit loop early to avoid wasted iterations.

iteration_report.description: Generated after each iteration of the loop

final_report.description: Generated when the loop exits (pass, max iterations, or no fixable violations)

format.remaining_violations: array of { check_id, severity, file, reason_not_fixed }

result_definitions.pass: All error-severity checks pass, no more than 2 warnings (matches validation-runner.json scoring)
result_definitions.conditional_pass: All error-severity checks pass, 3+ warnings remain
result_definitions.needs_manual_review: Error-severity violations remain that could not be auto-fixed

cross_references.validation_checks: validation-runner.json — source of all check definitions and scoring
cross_references.constraints: conventions.json → constraints — regex patterns for detection
cross_references.tokens: tokens.json — color/spacing/typography token lookup for replacements
cross_references.patterns: patterns.json — composition patterns for structural fixes
